global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a clear call to action and engaging gameplay elements.
global.main_message: Encouraging new players to unlock rewards and engage with the game.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the entire background, creating a vibrant and engaging atmosphere.

elements.label: PixelForge logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'PixelForge' in a bold, modern font, prominently displayed at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Unlock rare gear headline
elements.description: The headline reads 'Unlock rare gear' in a large, eye-catching font, positioned just below the logo.

elements.label: Free rewards text
elements.description: The text 'Free rewards for new players' is displayed in a smaller font beneath the headline, providing additional context.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A prominent 'Order now' button is located at the bottom of the ad, designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: Gameplay icon
elements.description: An icon representing gameplay features is centered in the ad, showcasing a simple, stylized game element.

elements.label: Decorative shapes
elements.description: Geometric shapes in lighter shades of purple are scattered throughout the background, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unclear element positioned at the top left, possibly a decorative feature or icon.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: Another unclear element located at the top right, contributing to the overall design.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, unclear element positioned in the center, possibly a decorative feature.

elements.description: Another small, unclear element located in the center, contributing to the overall design.
